name: Marinated Spiced Olives
recipeInstructions:
1. Add lemon slices, chilies, garlic, mustard seeds, peppercorns, and allspice berries to a large jar.
2. Pour in olive oil and stir well until combined.
3. Secure the lid tightly on the jar.
4. Turn the jar several times to ensure ingredients are well mixed.
5. Allow the olives to marinate for at least 1 week, turning the jar several times each day.
6. Store in a cool place for up to 6 months.
